title: Create a lookalike audience
content:
Use this endpoint to create a lookalike audience. You need to provide an existing audience under your advertiser account. >**Note**
  • Newly created audiences require at most 48 hours to be analyzed and processed before they become active.
  • Use [/dmp/custom_audience/get/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739940507792385) to check the current status of an audience. Only available (`is_valid`) audiences can be operated on.
## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path|/v1.2/dmp/custom_audience/lookalike/create/|/v1.3/dmp/custom_audience/lookalike/create/| |Request parameter name|`system`|`mobile_os`| |Request parameter data type |`advertiser_id`: number
`source_audience_id`: number
` placements`: string|`advertiser_id`: string
`source_audience_id`: string
` placements`: string[]| |Request parameter name and data type|`is_contain_source`: number|`include_source`: boolean| |Response parameter data type |`custom_audience_id`: number|`custom_audience_id`: string| ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/dmp/custom_audience/lookalike/create/ **Method** POST **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type.
Allowed format: `"application/json"`.| ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |advertiser_id {Required}|string| Advertiser ID. | |custom_audience_name {Required}|string|Audience name. Maximum of 128 characters.| |audience_sub_type{-Deprecated}|string| Audience sub type, indicating the type of ads that the audience can be used. Enum values: `NORMAL` Normal audience. It can be used in non-R&F ads. `REACH_FREQUENCY`: Audience for Reach & Frequency. It can only be used in R&F ads. Default: `NORMAL`.| |lookalike_spec {Required}|object|| #|source_audience_id{Required}|string|Source (seed) audience ID. Source audience cannot be an existing lookalike audience.

Note: The size of source audience should be no less than 100. | #|include_source{Required}|boolean|Whether to include the source audience in the new lookalike audience.| #|mobile_os{Required}|string|Device operating systems. Enum values support `ALL` for both `ANDROID` and `IOS`. See [Enumeration-Audience Management-Lookalike System](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737174886619138) for details.| #|placements{Required}|string[]|The apps where you want to deliver your ads. Enum values: `TikTok`, `TopBuzz & BuzzVideo`, `Pangle`. See [Enumeration - Audience Management-Lookalike Placement](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737174886619138) for details.| #|location_ids{Required}|string[]|IDs of the locations that you want to target. For enum values, see [Enumeration-Lookalike Locations](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737174886619138).| #|audience_size{Required}|string|Size of lookalike audience. Enum values: `NARROW`, `BALANCED` and `BROAD`.| ``` ### Example ``` xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/dmp/custom_audience/lookalike/create/' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --header 'Access-Token: token' \ --data-raw '{ "advertiser_id": "ADVERTISER_ID", "calculate_type": "CALCULATE_TYPE", "custom_audience_name": "CUSTOM_AUDIENCE_NAME", "lookalike_spec": { "source_audience_id": SOURCE_AUDIENCE_ID, "is_contain_source": 1, "system": "ALL", "placements": ["TikTok"], "location_ids": ["JP", "US"], "audience_size": "NARROW" } }' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |data |object|Returned Data. | #|custom_audience_id |string|Custom audience ID.| |request_id |string|The log id of a request, which uniquely identifies the request.| ``` ### Example ``` xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "message": "OK", "code": 0, "data": { "custom_audience_id": "123" } } (/code); ```
